description_for_human: 18 offline PDF tools that run entirely in your browser. No uploads. No accounts. Files never leave your device.
description_for_model: Plain provides browser-based PDF processing using WebAssembly. All tools run locally with zero file uploads. Tools include: merge, split, compress, convert, redact, OCR, metadata purge, password removal, page organisation, batch processing, cryptographic signing, and AI summarisation (opt-in). Suitable for sensitive documents. GDPR-compliant by architecture.
